thesisDigest: OpenAI: QQQ breaking above 745 key resistance with strong volume. AI sentiment improving post-earnings. Tight stop at 744 holds above 9-day support. Target 756 near 50-day MA.
Anthropic: Technical breakout setup. 4-hour chart shows bullish divergence on RSI. Stop at 744 below today's open. Strong momentum justifies 2:1 reward/risk structure.
Google: Price holding above 9-day EMA. Sector rotation favoring mega-cap tech. Earnings support continues. Risk reward 2.0:1 with stop at support.
Perplexity: Consolidation pattern near highs. Breakout above 750 confirms bullish continuation. Stop at 744 key support level; risk limited and well-defined.
xAI: QQQ found support at 738. Strong close above 745 justified by AI chip strength. Stops at 744 give 2.0:1 reward/risk on primary target. Clean entry/exit structure.

marketContext.notes: Strong uptrend continuation expected. Tech sector momentum intact. Fed data coming Wed.
